title: Corsi Block Tapper
description: An interactive clinical psychological simulation model based on the standardized Corsi Block-Tapping Task protocols used to evaluate visuospatial short-term memory capacity and spatial working memory boundaries. Built completely using client-side native web APIs, the utility structures 9 identical minimalist blocks scattered randomly across an asymmetric, chaotic bounding framework layout. The system orchestrates progressive sequential flash routines, parsing player input choices to track capacity indexes with state metrics saved securely via local browser cache controls.
